sections.paragraph:
Original: חלם

Transliteration: châlam

Phonetic: khaw-lam'

BDB Definition:

  1. to dream
    1. (Qal)
      1. to dream (ordinary)
      2. to dream (prophetic)
      3. to dream (of false prophets)
    2. (Hiphil) to dream
  2. to be healthy, be strong
    1. (Qal) to be healthy
    2. (Hiphil) to restore to health

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 662,663

Part(s) of speech: Verb
